summary: FASE 1 full-stack verification (change-password + Manual Book role-gating + Detail Harian export). 8/8 backend pytest passing and 15/15 frontend UI assertions passing. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1274 lines — consider splitting (auth/employees/attendance/exports/push) into modules for maintainability.

CORS_ORIGINS default is '*' with allow_credentials=False — fine for token-based auth; if cookies are ever used (get_current_user already reads cookies), allow_credentials must become True with explicit origins.
_build_summary returns workdays-attended as 'absent' regardless of date range vs. user start date; acceptable for current rekap purpose but may show inflated absences for users created mid-period.
Profile UI sends new_password === current_password to backend (no client-side equality check), backend returns 400 'berbeda' — would be nicer to validate client-side too, but functional.
test_credentials: Owner: owner@company.com / password123. Test created+deleted throwaway staff users (test_staff_*@company.com) for change-password & manual-link tests — all cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted throwaway staff users via /api/employees (owner auto-applies). No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_fase1.py covers change-password (4 cases), xlsx 'Detail Harian' sheet + column headers, PDF magic bytes, and regression (auth/me + dashboard/stats). Frontend Playwright validated: owner sees data-testid=manual-link, staff does NOT see it (and lacks nav-monitoring), pwd-card mismatch shows error toast 'Konfirmasi password tidak cocok', valid change shows 'Password berhasil diubah' and clears form, re-login with new password works, Monitoring page has download-pdf-btn / download-excel-btn.
verified_features: GET /api/attendance/summary/export?format=xlsx — 2 sheets ['Rekap Absensi','Detail Harian'] with columns [Tanggal, ID Karyawan, Nama, Departemen, Jam Masuk, Jam Pulang, Status]
Sidebar Manual Book link: visible for owner (MONITOR_ROLES), hidden for staff
Staff nav: checkin/history/face/profile present, monitoring absent
Profile password-card: client-side mismatch toast, success toast + form clear on valid submission
